rows.description: Recepta pro hoc Anno ad 2dum diem Novembris A.D. 1803.+
rows.notes: Description combined from both extractors based on visual verification. '2dum' from gpt-5-mini and '+' from gemini-flash are accurate to the image. Both correctly identified it as a header with no amounts.
rows.section_header: Recepta pro hoc Anno ad 2dum diem Novembris A.D. 1803.+

rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual inspection confirms this line is a standalone header/section label with no associated monetary amounts. gemini-flash incorrectly assigned amounts from the following entry to this line.
Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual inspection confirms the description and monetary amounts (552.4.5) are correct. gemini-flash incorrectly attributed amounts from a later line to this entry.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipts for the present year, amounting to £552 4s 5d.

rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual inspection confirms the description and monetary amounts (146.0.11½) are correct. The shillings column is blank, correctly interpreted as 0. The fraction symbol is clearly '½'. gemini-flash incorrectly attributed amounts from a later line.
rows.english_description: Bankers' receipts carried forward to the next year.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Bankers' receipts carried forward to the next year, amounting to £146 0s 11½d.

rows.notes: Overrode gpt-5-mini for the fraction. While gpt-5-mini correctly extracted the description and main amounts (1328.15.10), visual inspection clearly shows the fraction symbol for '¼', not '½'. gemini-flash incorrectly attributed amounts from the subsequent subtotal line.

Selected gpt-5-mini. This row is an unlabeled subtotal line in the image, clearly indicated by an underlined amount. gpt-5-mini correctly identified its existence, type, and value (2027.1.2¾). gemini-flash failed to extract this as a separate row and incorrectly mapped its amounts to the 'Recepta Varia' description.

Both extractors had consensus on amounts and fraction (835.11.7½). Description corrected based on visual inspection: 'Debit.' (as per gpt-5-mini) and 'praecedentis' (as per gemini-flash) combine to the most accurate reading.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Debits/receipts from the preceding year, amounting to £835 11s 7½d.

rows.notes: Overrode gpt-5-mini for the fraction. Both correctly identified the description and main amounts (2862.12.10). Visual inspection clearly shows the fraction symbol for '¼', not '½'. This line is underlined, correctly indicating a total.
Consensus between both extractors, confirmed by visual inspection. Clearly a header with no amounts.

Selected gemini-flash for correct shillings (8) and spelling of 'Officiariis'. gpt-5-mini misread shillings as 6 and had a minor typo in 'Officiaris'. Both correctly identified 0 pence and '½' fraction.
rows.english_description: Payments to the Rector, to the scholars, and to college officers.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payments to the Rector, to the scholars, and to college officers, amounting to £1436 8s ½d.

rows.notes: Consensus between both extractors, confirmed by visual inspection. Amounts (129.13.8) are clear.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Ordinary payments (regular recurring expenses), amounting to £129 13s 8d.

rows.notes: Consensus between both extractors, confirmed by visual inspection. Amounts (763.17.4½) are clear.

Selected gpt-5-mini. This row is an unlabeled subtotal line (2329.19.1) in the image, summing the preceding 'Soluta' items. gpt-5-mini correctly identified its existence and value. gemini-flash completely misattributed this amount to the 'Deficiency' entry.

Selected gpt-5-mini. It correctly identified this entry and its associated monetary value (38.13.7). The amount in the ledger has a preceding dash, indicating a deduction, but per schema, only positive values are extracted. Corrected description 'Rectori' to 'Rector's' based on visual inspection. gemini-flash misattributed the text and amount in this section.
rows.english_description: Supplement paid to cover a deficiency in the Rector's stipend.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Supplement paid to cover a deficiency in the Rector's stipend, amounting to £38 13s 7d.

rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini. It correctly associated the description 'Summa Solutorum' with the final underlined total amount (2368.12.8) for the 'Soluta' section. gemini-flash incorrectly assigned an earlier amount to this description and then left this total unlabeled.

Selected gemini-flash for correct fraction (0.25) and row type ('entry', as it is not underlined). gpt-5-mini misread the fraction as 0.5 and classified it as 'total'. Both had correct main amounts and description (including the dash).
rows.english_description: Amount brought forward from the receipts.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Amount brought forward from the receipts, amounting to £2862 12s 10¼d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for the correct row type ('entry', as it is not underlined). gpt-5-mini classified it as 'total'. Both had consensus on description and monetary amounts.
rows.english_description: Total payments deducted (sum of payments to be subtracted).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Total payments deducted (sum of payments to be subtracted), amounting to £2368 12s 8d.

rows.notes: Overrode both extractors for the full description, combining 'Rest. Solvend.' with 'a Dno Computante' as seen in the image. Selected gemini-flash's fraction (0.75) which is visually accurate. The shillings column shows dashes, correctly interpreted as 0. This line is underlined, confirming its type as 'total'. gpt-5-mini misread the fraction as 0.25 and type as 'entry'.
Selected gemini-flash for correct spelling 'comprobatus'. gpt-5-mini had 'comprobaturs'. Both correctly identified it as a header with no amounts.
Selected gemini-flash for correct spelling 'Rectorem' and appropriate row type ('entry' for a signatory line). gpt-5-mini had 'Receptorum' and classified as 'header'.
rows.english_description: Signature of H. Richards, the Rector, confirming the accounts.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Signature of H. Richards, the Rector, confirming the accounts.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for the full description 'J. Cole Subrectorem' and appropriate row type ('entry'). gpt-5-mini missed 'Subrectorem' and classified as 'header'.
rows.english_description: Signature of J. Cole, the Sub-Rector, confirming the accounts.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Signature of J. Cole, the Sub-Rector, confirming the accounts.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for the spelling 'Smythelubb' and appropriate row type ('entry'). Visual inspection supports this spelling over 'Smyth Glynbe' from gpt-5-mini.
rows.english_description: Signature of Tho Smythelubb, Senior Bursar, confirming the accounts.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Signature of Tho Smythelubb, Senior Bursar, confirming the accounts.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for the description 'Burs: Jun:' and appropriate row type ('entry'). gpt-5-mini had 'Burs. Junr.' and classified as 'header'.
rows.english_description: Signature of Sam. Hart, Junior Bursar, confirming the accounts.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Signature of Sam. Hart, Junior Bursar, confirming the accounts.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for the spelling 'Heyes' and appropriate row type ('entry'). Visual inspection supports 'Heyes' over 'Herges' from gpt-5-mini. Added the period after 'J.' for consistency based on image.
rows.english_description: Signature of J. L. Heyes, the Dean, confirming the accounts.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Signature of J. L. Heyes, the Dean, confirming the accounts.

rows.notes: Overrode both extractors based on direct visual inspection. The name appears to be 'Roodw'. gpt-5-mini had 'Rodwell' and gemini-flash had 'Koodle'. Classified as 'entry' as it's a signatory line.
rows.english_description: Signature of J. Roodw, A.M., confirming the accounts.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Signature of J. Roodw, A.M., confirming the accounts.
